title: NSA Evaluates Anthropic's Mythos AI for Cybersecurity
summary: The NSA tests Anthropic's Mythos AI model to identify cybersecurity vulnerabilities in software such as Microsoft products.
contents:
## NSA Evaluates Anthropic's Mythos AI for Cybersecurity

### Overview
The NSA tests Anthropic's Mythos AI model to identify cybersecurity vulnerabilities in software such as Microsoft products.

### Details
The National Security Agency benchmarks Mythos for speed and efficiency against traditional methods despite Anthropic limiting public access due to safety risks and White House opposition to broader distribution. Anthropic faces a legal conflict with the Department of Defense over its status as a supply-chain threat, yet the collaboration continues. This evaluation focuses on flaws in Microsoft technology.

### Geographic context
Location: null.
